rows.label: tev023701_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Shallot about the restaurant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Shallot if she has
any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Shallot about the restaurant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Shallot about the restaurant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome to Army Pizza, where we
give you a blast of salami and
cheese straight to the gut![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0002
rows.name:
Founded by Powell and Camilla,
this is NLA's hottest eatery![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0003
rows.name:
Sure, the owner is tough and...kinda
scary. But the pizzas he makes are works
of art that taste as good as they look![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0004
rows.name:
And his wife Camilla is a wonderful
person who took me in when I quit my
job and had nowhere else to go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm just a part-timer here, but I want
to do everything I can to make this
restaurant a nicer place to visit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0006
rows.name:
We deliver throughout NLA, so
you can call in an Army Pizza
air strike anywhere, anytime![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0009
rows.name:
There's a BLADE who always comes
in here to eat by herself. She
always seems kinda lonely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0010
rows.name:
She was just telling me that
she's being sent on a mission to
Valley of Oblivion's Big Arch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0011
rows.name:
It made me wonder if she's
doing THAT by herself?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0012
rows.name:
I mean, if she were, that would be
really dangerous, right? She certainly
doesn't look all that tough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0013
rows.name:
I hope she has some friends to
watch her back, though she's
never mentioned having any...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0021
rows.name:
As you can see, business is booming
thanks to those long-eared shorties![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0022
rows.name:
Powell is drenched with sweat from
cooking up so many grenade pizzas...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0023
rows.name:
And Camilla and I do nothing but
run back and forth between the
restaurant and the Ma-non ship![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0024
rows.name:
Naturally, I'm thrilled to see our cute
little pizzeria become such a big hit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0025
rows.name:
...Although when I see the
exhaustion on Camilla's face,
I can't help but worry a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0026
rows.name:
She's not the sort to complain,
but she's been working nonstop
for I-don't-know how long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0027
rows.name: I just hope she isn't overdoing it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0042
rows.name:
I'm sorry... Everything is
such a mess right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0043
rows.name:
I'm really not in the mood to
talk about the restaurant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0044
rows.name: Sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Shallot about the restaurant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Shallot about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0045
rows.name:
Powell ran off somewhere in a hurry,
and now I'm the only one left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0046
rows.name:
At first I didn't know what to do, but
then I decided that I'd do everything I
could to keep Army Pizza up and running.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0047
rows.name:
I still can't make a very good grenade
pizza, and I know next to nothing
about how to manage a business...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0048
rows.name:
But I'll just have to keep cooking up pizzas till
they start to improve! Oh, and I plan to ask
Bergamot at the Sunshine Café for business advice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0049
rows.name:
If I'm gonna keep this place
running, I've got a lot to learn.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0050
rows.name:
If Camilla and the others are ever able to
come back, I want them to be proud of what
I've done with their little Army Pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0053
rows.name:
I've finally learned how to run a
restaurant by myself, but I'm still
making huge mistakes every day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0054
rows.name:
Powell wasn't just some scary guy—he
was also a really great businessman![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0055
rows.name:
He'd make a pizza with whatever
crazy toppings the Ma-non wanted
because he was a pro like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0056
rows.name:
Even that time a Ma-non ordered
a melon, ketchup, and cheese pizza,
he made it look incredible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0057
rows.name:
I'd like to be as good
as he was one day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev023701_MSG0058
rows.name:
But it was Camilla who loved this place the
most. So I'm gonna get Army Pizza firing on all
cylinders, just the way she'd want it to be![ST:wait ]
